name: pbxware-event-catcher
description: Self-hosted webhook event catcher for PBXware Event Publisher

scripts.build:all: bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/pbxware-event-catcher-linux-x64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64-baseline --outfile dist/pbxware-event-catcher-linux-x64-baseline && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile dist/pbxware-event-catcher-linux-arm64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/pbxware-event-catcher-darwin-x64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/pbxware-event-catcher-darwin-arm64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile dist/pbxware-event-catcher-windows-x64.exe
